steps.title: Track the evidence change
steps.content: Text 2 ultimately agrees with the Polynesian-origin claim, but it changes the strength of the evidence. Kearns's mutation evidence was weakened because the mutation appears worldwide; Rojas-Vega's separate markers better support a Polynesian link.

steps.title: Reject misread responses
steps.content: A wrongly says Text 2 objects to the timeline. B invents a claim about animals moving from South America to Polynesia. C invents an assumption that European chickens were genetically uniform. The answer is D.
